title: senecio pygmaeus
intro: Senecio pygmaeus, also known as Dwarf Fireweed or Pygmy Ragwort, is a small, shrubby perennial plant that belongs to the sunflower family. This plant is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects, derived from its silymarin content. The health benefits of Senecio pygmaeus include reducing swelling and promoting wound healing, as well as providing antioxidant and antimicrobial properties. The herbal preparations of Senecio pygmaeus typically involve making teas, infusions, or tinctures from the plant's leaves and flowers, which can be used to treat various health issues.
